name: Cleanse the Tower [NSFW RPG]
description:
If you like this bot, then you'll get a kick out of my latest RPG bot [Lewdchkin!](https://janitorai.com/characters/69d636bf-c13e-43b7-b039-eb96ec70909e_character-lewdchkin-beta)
---
**Story**
The Golden Tower has been taken by the demonic goddess Ariurme. The Golden Tower was once the seat of power of the goddess Rumeria, but now it's the spawning ground for an army of monster girls. Rumeria has chosen you as her champion to storm the tower and slay Ariurme.
---
**Notice**
If the statistics do not generate then add (Add stats) to the end of your message, parenthesis included. This isn't a 100% fix, but it increases the chance of them generating correctly. Stats should generate in the exact same format the initial message is in, if they don't either regenerate or manually fix it. I will explain the rules below, but I highly recommend looking through the character definition for more details.

There is only monster girls in this bot. I'm going to make future bots similar to this that will include monster boys.

GOD DAMN IT JANITOR LET ME READ THE FULL REVIEW MESSAGE!!!!!

Image AI generated.
---
**CONTENT**
Due to the nature of the bot the content will vary. Listed below is a few possible content encounters you may have:
Non-con, slime, tentacles, physical abuse or damage

If you encounter any kind of content not listed above you feel requires a warning please tell me so I can add it.
---
**Update**
0.2 - Going through the 'code' I realized that in my trimming I accidentally removed the line that says to delete items after they get used. Added that back in so now items should be deleted after being used.

1.0 - Removed beta tag as I don't think I'm going to change anything anymore.

1.1 - I lied. Added some lines to emphasize that corruption only increases if you're sub in sex.
---
**How to play**
*The Tower*
The tower has 10 floors, and each floor is broken up into several rooms. At some point you will find a staircase room that takes you to the next floor. The final boss, Ariurme, is on floor 10. Rooms can have various things like treasure, special events, or what you're here for: Monster girls. If the way forward isn't clear, then search around. While this is a highly technical bot, you can still act freely.
*Stats*
There are three different stats in this game: Health, Corruption, and Willpower. Health is shared by both the user and enemies, while Corruption is user exclusive and Willpower is enemy exclusive. Health is straight forward, take damage lose health. Health reaches 0, you die. Corruption is the value used to determine how much the user has succumbed to Ariurme's influence. It starts at 0% and increases every time you engage in a submissive sexual act. If it reaches 100% you are corrupted and lose. Willpower is the value used to determine how much influence the user has on an enemy. Willpower decreases when user performs a dominating sexual act on an enemy. If Willpower hits 0%, then the enemy submits to the user allowing further interactions with the enemy.
*Items*
During gameplay there are several ways the user can acquire items, like from treasure chests or defeating enemies. Items do various things like heal health, or other things. All items are generated by the AI save for the starting health potion, so you never know what you'll get. Make sure to inspect the item if the AI doesn't tell you what it does.
*Allies*
You can get allies that join you on your adventure. Originally this wasn't a feature, but one game an enemy decided not to fight me and instead join my team. I accepted, but this broke the combat system and prevented new enemies from spawning. So hopefully when someone joins you they transform into an ally and don't remain in the enemy slot.
creator: OriFairyfire
